arts.sum: Geoffrey Kondogbia’s (31) place in the Olympique de Marseille team had looked under threat when Roberto De Zerbi arrived over the summer. It was no secret that the Italian manager’s…

arts.ttl: OGC Nice’s Hicham Boudaoui out for a month but Sofiane Diop nearing return

arts.ttl: Marseille president insists he has NO regrets over signing Mason Greenwood... and blasts the city's mayor for publicly opposing his £30m move from Man United
arts.sum: The mayor of Marseille Benoit Payan was among those who publicly opposed the signing of Greenwood, stating he did not want his club to be 'shamed by someone who hits his wife'.

arts.ttl: ‘We have to be ambitious’ – Pablo Longoria sets out Marseille’s long-term plan

arts.ttl: Marseille chief responds for Mason Greenwood after Lee Carsley makes England decision
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood has scored five goals in three Ligue 1 games for Marseille, but a recall to the England side is highly unlikely under interim manager Lee Carsley

arts.ttl: Preview: Marseille vs. Nice - prediction, team news, lineups

arts.ttl: Neal Maupay featured on OGC Nice shortlist before Marseille move
